items.text:
Hey everyone, my name is Elias from 2 Liters Shady Films and I just released a new trailer for my indie horror feature film, Mocos. If you have a few minutes of your time, I’d really appreciate you checking it out.

I’m an independent filmmaker currently writing, editing, and filming the project myself, so every view, like, comment, and share truly goes a long way in supporting indie creators like me. 

I’m still actively filming and looking for anyone interested in getting involved with the feature film. No experience is necessary, and I have a ton of remote self-film scenes available that can be done right from the comfort of your own home using my detailed instructions.

If interested, feel free to message me directly or email me at mocosthemovie@gmail.com

Thank you again for the support and for helping independent horror continue to grow!

https://youtu.be/UcvK93KTtzY?si=_KVtQ_4leSnZgkw3

items.text: Hi guys! Starting this fall, I’ll be splitting my time between LA and Vancouver, Canada. I have a beautiful 1-bedroom apartment in South Vancouver and I’m looking to connect with a female actress in LA who might be interested in occasional apartment swaps (LA/VAN), hosting each other from time to time, or something along those lines. Would love to connect if that sounds like something you’d be into. Thanks so much :) My IG is https://www.instagram.com/iammagalie/

items.text:
Web Series Casting!

TPWM, a light hearted web-series exploring masculinity in America is looking to cast for its first season. 

Who we are:

A group of emerging filmmakers working to bring an exciting Web Series to life and need your help! 

What do we need:

Actors! We have a full season to cast and need humble thespians such as yourself! Since there are a wide array of available roles, we're asking that everyone come in with one comedy and one dramatic monologue. 

When are auditions:

We'll be hosting auditions on Sunday Jun 7th. 

Where will they be:

Location will be emailed to you upon confirmation. 

For anyone who can't make it, we're asking for self tapes to be sent to [theproblemwmseries@gmail.com](mailto:theproblemwmseries@gmail.com)

What we offer:

Free Session with our Headshot Photographer

Food & Bev

In-Kind Creative Services

We are a no-budget production but we want to figure out how to make it work with you! So we're open to negotiate.

Thank you for taking the time. We're excited to get to know you!

topComments.text: Whatever you need I’m down to help
If you could use me, you would have to get me there. I'm willing to cover room and food.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of food

items.text:
Hey everyone! I’m currently a film student looking to get real on-set experience and start building my career in the industry.

I’m super passionate about filmmaking and want to learn as much as I can by actually being on set whether that’s as a production assistant, helping behind the scenes, or just being an extra and observing how everything runs.

If anyone has advice, knows of opportunities, or is working on projects that could use an extra set of hands, I’d really appreciate the chance to be involved. I’m reliable, eager to learn, and ready to put in the work.

Thanks in advance!

Based in Southern California

items.text:
***Are you home educating (or thinking about it) but feeling a bit isolated and worried about your child missing out socially? ❤️‍🩹*** ☕️🙋🏻‍♀️
Well we’ve got a lovely little free **WhatsApp chat** for home educating parents and guardians! 💬🫶🏼

✨ It’s a friendly space to **meet like-minded families**, swap ideas, get inspiration, ask questions, and share encouragement ☺️

Whether you’re a seasoned home educator or just exploring the idea, you’re very welcome to join our little community 💛

Let me know if you'd like to be added! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
items.summary:
***Are you home educating (or thinking about it) but feeling a bit isolated and worried about your child missing out socially? ❤️‍🩹*** ☕️🙋🏻‍♀️
Well we’ve got a lovely little free **WhatsApp chat** for home educating parents and guardians! 💬🫶🏼

✨ It’s a friendly space to **meet like-minded families**, swap ideas, get inspiration, ask questions, and share encouragement ☺️

Whether you’re a seasoned home educator or just exploring the idea, you’re very welcome to join our little community 💛

Let me know if you'd like to be added! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee

items.text:
Places & People: Burcu and Turkish Hospitality 1 - KarrideoTV https://youtu.be/rSky6aV76DM 

Burcu in Faralya is the beginning of a special KarrideoTV travel series about hospitality, nature, craftsmanship and the story behind the Soap Lady. 

In this first part of Places & People, I, Christian Weiße, meet host Burcu on her property in Faralya. Many people know Burcu as the Soap Lady, but behind this name there is much more than just a beautiful travel image. 

This video is not a classic hotel tour and not a superficial travel recommendation. It is a calm travel dialogue about a special place, a special woman and a world created from nature, family, soap craftsmanship, art and genuine hospitality. 

Faralya is located above Ölüdeniz and combines Mediterranean landscapes, peace, views and proximity to the Lycian Way. This is exactly where the atmosphere is created that Burcu’s guests describe again and again: personal, warm, slow-paced and full of details. 

In Part 1, the first glimpse opens onto Burcu, her energy and the place where Soap Lady Cottage, Daisy Suite and Lion Suite become a small Mediterranean world of experience. 

This video is part of the KarrideoTV playlist “TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure”. 

Subscribe, like, share and comment to follow the full series. 

Which encounter while traveling has ever shown you that a place becomes truly special because of the person behind it? 

Links and resources: 

Soap Lady & More: https://soapladyoludeniz.com/ 

KarrideoTV Playlist: TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure | KarrideoTV

sharedPost.text:
🎤 Belting Workshop – klug laut singen
Ein anatomisch klares und zugleich praktisches Verständnis der lauten Stimmproduktion im Stil von Ethel Merman. ✨

Viele Strukturen der Stimmproduktion lassen sich bewusst steuern, um intensive Klanggebung mit möglichst wenig stimmlichem Aufwand zu erzeugen. Gemeinsam haben wir diese Prozesse besprochen, visuell und akustisch erforscht 👂🫁 und direkt in Übungen sowie Songs angewendet 🎶

Danke für eure Offenheit, eure Neugier und die gemeinsame stimmliche Arbeit 💛
Ich wünsche euch viel Freude mit den neuen Impulsen und weiterhin kraftvolles, gesundes Singen. Bis bald! 🎭🎵

Der nächste Belting Workshop ist am: 
Belting - 18-22 Uhr Online & Frankfurt

sharedPost.text:
In genau einer Woche startet die schwärzeste Gartenparty des Jahres.Samstag sind wir dran☝️.Wir freuen uns sehr auf euch und haben einige Überraschungen vorbereitet. Macht euch schick – wir werden von einem Filmteam begleitet😜. Die Tickets sind fast ausverkauft. Wer noch dabei sein möchte, sollte jetzt zugreifen. Schönes Wochenende, Marco und Nils🖤.

#GartenpartyDesJahres #SchwärzesteGartenparty #SummerVibes #dark #live

items.text:
Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting. 

I would like to put it out there again that I am an actor based in KY and always ready for work!

I am 19 years old and 5’8”

According to many, my main types to play in film are 

1.  Intelligent outsider
2. Introverted lead
3. Anxious teen
4. Horror protagonist 
5. Artistic/creative student 
6. Emotionally observant character
7. Younger character in mystery/drama
8. Sarcastic teen

I have a lot of experience in film and theatre and always looking to expand! I am also looking for representation to take a step up in the industry.

Dm me for collaboration! 

When you dm I will send my resume and demo reel.

items.text:
Reposting this so that everyone gets a chance to audition

DEADLINE: June 5th, 2026

CASTING CALL — Hope Among The Cosmos Short Film | Rockford, IL Area | Shooting last two weekends of September 2026 (19th, 20th, 26th, 27th)

Hope Among The Cosmos is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story about a father and daughter on a routine trading run that goes very wrong. It's got action, heart, and some genuinely dark moments. Think practical effects, real locations, and a story worth telling.

This is a student/indie production, unpaid, but you'll get credit, meals on shoot days, and footage of your work when it's ready.

WHO I'M LOOKING FOR:

XANDER, Male, 30s-40s The dad. Big presence, quiet intensity, carries a lot of weight he doesn't talk about. This is a physical role but the emotional stuff is what really matters. If you can be still and terrifying at the same time, I want to meet you. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

MINA , Female, 12-15 Xander's daughter and the soul of this film. She's not a sidekick. She's watching her dad's world for the first time and figuring out what she believes. I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, open to the right person.

LORELEI , Female, 30s Xander's wife. She's got a prosthetic leg, wears a tool belt, and looks like someone who's kept a family alive through sheer will. Small role but she needs to feel real the second she's on screen. Open to everyone.

LILITH , Female, around 7 The little sister. She's got one line and a stuffed rabbit with one eye and she will absolutely steal the scene. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

YOUNG XANDER , Male, 8-11 A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

HELENE & ANORRA , Female, 8-12 each Two girls in the same flashback. They're ahead of Young Xander, picking through debris. Small roles but they help build the world. Open to all.

JACKSON , Male, 50s A farmer and trader who refuses to break even when things get very bad. He's got maybe five minutes of screen time and needs to make you feel everything. Open to all.

ELLEN (Jackson's Wife) , Female, 30s-40s Non-speaking. She died trying to protect her kid. The image says everything. You need to be comfortable with fake blood and staged death. Open to all.

JACKSON'S CHILDREN (x3) , Under 12 Also non-speaking. Same situation, this is heavy material and parents need to know that going in. Open to all.

BIONIC , Male, late 20s-40s The villain. Cybernetic arm, artificial eye, zero mercy. This role needs a separate prosthetic fitting before we shoot, plan for an extra session. If you want to play a genuinely scary person, this is your role. Open to all.

RAZOR , Male, late 20s-40s Bionic's partner and honestly the more terrifying of the two. Full metallic skull prosthetic, razor teeth, moves like something that used to be human. Full face appliance means a fitting session and extra time in the chair on shoot days. If you can commit to that and move like an animal, I want to talk. Open to all.

EXTRAS / BACKGROUND , Various ages Farmers, survivors, colony members. If you just want to be part of it, reach out. Open to all.

Heads up: This film has staged violence, fake blood, and some genuinely dark dramatic moments. Nothing unsafe happens on set, ever, but you should know what you're signing up for. For anyone under 18, a parent or guardian must be on set for the entire time; there are no exceptions.

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]

Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. Experience helps, but it's not what I'm looking for first. A reel is welcome if you have one.

topComments.text:
Interested.. sent you an Email. 
Thanks, 
Sam

items.text:
Hello all!

 

One of our actors had to leave our production due to recent health complications. We are currently looking for someone to replace the characters of Egeus/Philostrate. This role will be double cast as it's relatively small scene wise (roughly only in 2.5 scenes)

 

No specific gender or race requirements; would prefer a taller actor 5'8+ but not a dealbreaker if this doesn't apply. This is a community theatre volunteer role; actors and crew are NOT paid.

 

Location: Virginia Highlands, ATL 30306

 

**Current remaining rehearsal schedule **

**-T/Th 7-10pm**

**-Sat 10am-2pm**

**-Wed 6/3  7-10pm**

**-Fri 6/5 6-9pm**

 

**TECH **

**6/6-6/10 (NO Sunday rehearsal)**

 

**SHOWS **

**6/11-6/20**

**Thurs-Sat @8pm**

**Sun & 6/20 @2pm**

 

If interested or know someone who may be a good fit, please email our director/producer at the following

 

Info Renegade Theatre Co. <[info@renegadetheatreco.org](mailto:info@renegadetheatreco.org)>

 

Renegade Theatre <[renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com](mailto:renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com)>

topComments.text: Sweetie, they leave not for health reasons but because they had to work for “money”… gotta drop the “free” stuff when the bills gotta be paid 🤦🏻‍♀️

items.title: Hello all!

items.text:
Hello!  I'm planning to make a short film in the coming month and need a few actors.

Title: "Jude and the Bartender."  About a ten-minute film.

A young bartender finds himself panicking when all of the booze he was supposed to serve at a wedding suddenly disappears, and a mysterious St. Jude card shows up to save the day.

Characters:

BARISTA: 25-25, female, any race.

EMILY: 25-45, female, the wedding coordinator.

JUDE: 25-50, male, the caterer.

I likely have BEN (the bartender) cast already but if anything changes I'll post it here.

This will be a volunteer gig but I promise it'll be fun and shouldn't take more than a few days to shoot.  Beers will be on me when shooting is done.

If interested, email me at brettmanero@gmail.com!

items.text:
Stagebugz Theatre is thrilled to announce **auditions for actors ages 18+ for our upcoming world-premiere production of *****Cryptophasia*****! **

**Audition Information**

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th. 

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)

**Dates**

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed****[ ****HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1IZan_G4JGy2t60LuXnOE8it60DEbmZNzfAH0-9jTy4U/edit?usp=sharing)****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals. 

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit. 

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre. *

**Show Synopsis**

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand. 

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Breakdown**

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

 

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

 

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

 

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

 

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

**Production Team**

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

**About Us**

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects. 

For questions or to learn more, visit [[www.stagebugztheatre.com](www.stagebugztheatre.com)](http://www.stagebugztheatre.com) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.

items.text:
Some secrets survive a lifetime.
DHANDA. Written by Shah Yasir. Directed by Ayeshah Alam. A short film by Dreamers HTX. Now casting in Houston.

We are looking for two exceptional South Asian actors who are not afraid of silence, stillness, and truth.

TALHA. Male. Mid to late 40s. A man with everything to lose and one secret he has never allowed himself to face.

JEHAN ARA. Female. Early 40s. Stunning. Magnetic. Unshakeable. The emotional anchor of the entire film.

Dialogue in English with natural use of Urdu. Familiarity with the South Asian cultural world is essential.

Some secrets survive a lifetime.
DHANDA. Written by Shah Yasir. Directed by Ayeshah Alam. A short film by Dreamers HTX. Now casting in Houston.

We are looking for two exceptional South Asian actors who are not afraid of silence, stillness, and truth.

TALHA. Male. Mid to late 40s. A man with everything to lose and one secret he has never allowed himself to face.

JEHAN ARA. Female. Early 40s. Stunning. Magnetic. Unshakeable. The emotional anchor of the entire film.

Dialogue in English with natural use of Urdu. Familiarity with the South Asian cultural world is essential.

To submit, send your headshot, bio or resume, and two to three lines on why this role speaks to you to dreamershtx@gmail.com by June 30, 2026.

Selected applicants receive full details and self-tape sides by July 7, 2026.

Tell us why you. Tell us why now. Tell us why this story.

Actor. Director. Storyteller.

With 20+ years of experience in film, television, theatre, and commercials, I’ve been fortunate to work on projects for Wegovy, Mizuho Bank, NBC Weather App, AOL, MTV, and a variety of award-winning and independent productions.

Currently directing multiple projects while continuing to pursue acting opportunities. Open to quality collaborations in film, television, commercials, digital media, and branded content.

IMDb, reel, headshots, and professional materials are available upon request.

I am happy to discuss availability, scope, and production needs on a case-by-case basis.

#Actor #Director #NYCActor #NJActor #CommercialActor #Casting #FilmMaker #Television #Storyteller

items.text: I går aftes lavede min svigerinde aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg sagde endda til hende, at hun ikke måtte lade børnene spise det. Jeg vasker altid hakket oksekød, inden jeg tilbereder det. Jeg kan ikke tro, at hun ikke gjorde det. Burde man ikke vaske hakket oksekød, inden man tilbereder det?

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

topComments.text: Har da aldrig hørt noget så fjollet

items.text:
🎬 CASTING-ALARM: Wirst du Teil von Uwe Bolls nächstem Blockbuster? 🎬

Du wolltest schon immer mal Filmluft schnuppern, Regie-Legende Uwe Boll live in Action erleben und dich selbst auf der großen Leinwand sehen? 

Dann ist das hier deine Chance!

Für einen spektakulären Filmdreh (und zwar dem inoffiziellen HOUSE OF THE DEAD Sequel: 23 YEARS LATER – ZOMBIES IN THE CASTLE) verwandeln wir die legendäre Burg Frankenstein in eine filmische Kulisse – und wir brauchen DICH als Statist, Komparse oder Crew-Mitglied hinter der Kamera!!

🏰 DIE FACTS:

Wann: Anfang September 2026 (04.09. - etwa 09.09.)

Wo: Burg Frankenstein, Mühltal bei Darmstadt

🧟 WEN WIR SUCHEN:

Jede Menge motivierte Gesichter! Egal ob jung oder alt, „Männlein“ oder „Weiblein“, markant oder klassisch – wir suchen die volle Bandbreite an Charakteren.

Wir brauchen Leute, die Bock auf ein unvergessliches Set-Erlebnis haben. 

Keine Vorerfahrung nötig! Bring einfach gute Laune, Geduld (ja, Filmsets bedeuten auch mal Warten 😉) und die Bereitschaft mit, Vollgas zu geben, wenn es heißt: „Und Action!“. 
Und zwar sowohl VOR, als auch HINTER der Kamera! 

💥 DAS ERWARTET DICH:

👉Ein exklusiver Blick hinter die Kulissen einer echten Film-Produktion.

👉Kulinarische Verpflegung am Set (niemand hungert bei uns!).

👉Eine unvergessliche Zeit auf einer der unheimlichsten und coolsten Burgen Deutschlands. (Das wird mein 7. Film. Und, ja, es war jedesmal eine absolut coole und unvergessliche Zeit!!)

 🔥Bist du bereit für das filmische Inferno auf Burg Frankenstein? Dann bewirb dich JETZT! 🔥

📩Schicke uns einfach eine kurze Nachricht per WhatsApp an:  an:  

+49 151 681 72 591

Teilen erwünscht! Markiert eure Freunde, die schon immer mal ins Kino gehörten!

‼️Und noch ein wichtiger privater Tipp: ‼️

Da es sich um einen Horrorfilm handelt, bringt unbedingt einen kompletten Satz Wechselkleidung mit!!

(Unterwäsche, Socken, Hose, Shirt und, ganz wichtig, Schuhe!! Auch ein Handtuch wäre nicht schlecht, da man nach Drehende eventuell doch etwas „blutig“ aussehen könnte.)

@Follower 
#UweBoll #movie #movies #horror #splatter #germany #frankenstein #independent #fun

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM FROM UNKNOWN TO LEAD ROLES ON NETFLIX
It Seems Like You've Done Everything Right. So How Come Nothing Is Moving?

You trained. You got the headshots. You got the reel. Maybe you even got the agent.
And yet you are sitting here wondering why nothing is moving.

How are you supposed to break into Netflix-level work when nobody actually explains the strategy behind it?

I am Freya Tingley. I’m from Perth. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC's Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It was not.

What you are not being told is that most of the work happens before the audition room. The actors who book have
figured out how to engineer their own access. The ones who do not are still waiting to be discovered.

I have been getting a lot of messages from actors lately saying things like:

"I have an agent but no auditions."
"I am auditioning but not booking."
"I do not know what I am doing wrong."

What if the problem is not your talent?

What if it is the strategy, or the lack of one?

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you are stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next.

I would rather you have clarity than spend another year guessing.

If you know you need to move, DM me "COMMIT" to apply for a session.

What would it cost you to keep doing what you have been doing?

items.text:
🤍 **MODEL & ACTOR CASTING CALL** 💙

**Otwieramy rekrutację dla nowych twarzy!**
Do naszych nadchodzących produkcji fotograficznych, reklamowych, teatralnych oraz fabularnych poszukujemy** dzieci w wieku 4–16 lat.**

Szukamy dzieci, które wyróżniają się urodą, energią i talentem. Mile widziane są osoby odważne, kreatywne i swobodnie czujące się przed aparatem oraz kamerą.

💙 Jeśli Twoje dziecko marzy o przygodzie w świecie modelingu i aktorstwa, wyślij zgłoszenie na adres: **biuro@elsastudio.pl**

**W treści maila prosimy o podanie:**
• imienia i nazwiska dziecka
• wieku
• wzrostu
• miejsca zamieszkania
• numeru telefonu do rodzica
• informacji o doświadczeniu aktorskim lub modelingowym

**Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć:**
🤍 aktualne zdjęcia portretowe oraz sylwetki
💙 krótkie nagranie, w którym dziecko przedstawia się i opowiada o swoich zainteresowaniach

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🤍
Elsa studio

items.text:
Allround-TV geht völlig neue Wege mit Auftrags-Video-Produktionen in virtueller Umgebung. Wir erstellen komplette virtuelle Studios nach Ihren Vorgaben, setzen den Moderator, die Moderatorin via GreenScreen in die virtuelle 3D Umgebung, animieren die Szene mit Tracking-Kameras in Echtzeit und schalten Studiogäste, Interviewpartner, Experten auf Wunsch weltweit via Live-Stream zu. Eine fantastische Möglichkeit, Ihren Video-Content technisch auf der Höhe der Zeit zu erstellen. Ab sofort möglich im eigenen professionellen Video-Studio von Allround-TV in Altötting. Wir setzen Sie in Szene!
Montage & Screenshots © 2026 by Allround-TV

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Across Cultures Film Festival — Official Announcement
We are excited to introduce the first edition of Across Cultures Film Festival, taking place in Bamberg, Germany on July 25, 2026.
A curated one-day event focused on powerful short films exploring identity, migration, and human connection across cultures.
✨ We are currently gathering interest from filmmakers worldwide.  
you can submit here:
https://filmfreeway.com/acrossculturesfilm
🎞️ Categories:
• Short Film  
• Cross-Cultural Story  
• Student Film  
📍 Bamberg, Germany  
📅 July 25, 2026  
💸 Free submission (o

Stories beyond borders.
#acrosscultures #filmfestival #comingsoon #shortfilm #indiefilm filmmakers cinema festival germany Weniger anzeigen

My baby is officially graduating & I’m one proud mama 🥹💙
Watching you grow into such a smart, handsome, funny, and intelligent little boy has been the greatest blessing. You’re becoming such a big boy right before my eyes, and I couldn’t be more proud of you.

Class of 2026 🎓
The world better watch out because my baby is coming! ✨ 
Brianna Oliver

items.text:
Actors —

We are currently developing and adapting De Nieuwe Ridderorde (1832), South Africa’s first play.

For almost 200 years, these characters and scenes have never truly been brought to life for a modern audience.

Starting this June, we will begin filming vertical storytelling scenes and performances based on the material.

This is an opportunity to:
• become one of the first actors to perform these characters,
• help shape the future adaptation of South Africa’s first play,
• and leave your own interpretation and creative mark on material that has been dormant for generations.

If you want to be part of bringing this forgotten piece of South African theatre history back to life, apply below:

https://forms.gle/Xdtiof1BziSTGWZG9

sharedPost.text: Join Boniface Development Lab & Perform Characters & Scenes From De Nieuwe Ridderorde - SA’s 1st Play, Published 1832 #vlytartacting

CASTING CALL:

Casting 3 grandmas (senior women 60s-80s). Legal grandma status not necessary. Bonus points if you apply with your friends.

Professional video game players will be teaching you how to play a game, and you will compete against other grandmas to determine the **greatest grandma. **Video will be posted on youtube.

Rate is $40/hr for 5 hours ($200). Shoot is Wednesday June 3, sometime between 9-5 in Vancouver. Project is non - union.

To apply please send a headshot, some information about you, and a reel if available. Deadline Sunday May 31st

Email to: danielfilmSR@gmail.com

items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

***We are still seeking the roles below for our Storyhive short. Please submit ASAP!* **

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

items.text:
🎬 **TV-PROJEKT SUCHT: Ein Raum-Makeover in Köln & Umgebung! ⛺**

Hey zusammen! 👋 Habt ihr Lust, euch entspannte Festival-Vibes in die eigenen vier Wände zu holen?

Für ein neues TV-Projekt verwandelt Raumdesignerin Emell Gök Che deinen Raum in eine warme, gemütliche Wüsten-Oase im coolen „Desert Modern“-Style. ✨🌵

Mehr Infos gibt’s im verlinkten Post. Wenn ihr Lust auf das Makeover habt, meldet euch einfach per PN bei mir! 📧

sharedPost.text:
Du wohnst in Köln oder Umgebung und hast Lust auf einen echten Tapetenwechsel?🌿🐪 Wir holen dir die entspannten Festival-Vibes des legendären „Burning Man“ direkt nach Hause!🎉Raumdesignerin Emell Gök Che verwandelt deinen Raum in eine gemütliche Wüsten-Oase – warm, erdig und modern. Das Ganze wird für ein öffentlich-rechtliches TV-Format begleitet und aufgezeichnet.✨🌵

Du hast Interesse? Schreib uns eine PN oder melde dich per Mail an wohnenunddesign@bavaria-entertainment.de📧

#Köln #NRW #DesertModern #FestivalVibes #InteriorDesign #Wohnung #Haus #Makeover #VorherNachher #Emell #WüstenLook #Interior #Zuhause #Wohnideen #Casting #CastingCall #TV #Dreharbeiten #ÖffentlichRechtlich #BavariaEntertainment #KölnUndUmgebung #Projektabschluss #DesignLiebe #Mitmachen #WohnTrend #BurningMan

RAUMDESIGNERIN EMELL GÖK CHE BRINGT DEN VIBE DER WUSTEIN DEINE VIER WÄNDE. WARME ERDTÖNE WARMEERDTÖNE.NATÜRLICHE NATÜRLICHE MATERIALIEN WIE HOL UND STEIN SOWIE KLARE KLAREFORMEN FORMEN SCHAFFEN DEN ANGESAGTENLOOK ENANGESALTENOR EINE WOHNLICHE WOHNLICHEHOMMAGE HOMMAGE AN DAS BURNING MAN FESTIVAL, DIE ALLES ANDERE ALS KARG IST!'

items.text:
Hey zusammen :)
ich bin 20 und möchte mich ernsthaft im Schauspiel weiterentwickeln – sowohl im Bereich Theater als auch Film.
Ich habe bereits mit Monologen gearbeitet und erste Vorsprechen-Erfahrung gesammelt, merke aber, dass mir vor allem Praxis, Austausch und Kontakte fehlen.
Deshalb suche ich:
– Leute auf ähnlichem Level zum gemeinsamen Üben (Monologe/Szenen)
– kleine Film- oder Theaterprojekte (auch Low Budget/Studentenprojekte)
– und generell Austausch mit anderen Schauspieler:innen (gern auch etwas erfahrener), z.B. zu Themen wie Einstieg, Agenturen etc.
Mir geht es darum, Erfahrung zu sammeln, besser zu werden und mich Schritt für Schritt in dem Bereich aufzubauen.
Ich bin zuverlässig, motiviert und offen für Neues 🙌
Falls jemand Lust hat, sich auszutauschen oder etwas zusammen zu starten, schreibt mir gern!

sharedPost.text:
WE ARE LOOKING FOR PEOPLE WITH OLIVE OR DARKER SKIN TONES to play افغان characters in a feature film

We are filming a war story set in Afghanistan. We are looking for women, men, and children with olive or darker complexions - they do not have to be real Afghans.

No experience is required! Anyone can apply and see firsthand what working on a movie set looks like behind the scenes.

DATE & LOCATION: June 11, 2026 - Dąbrowa Górnicza

PAY: 350 PLN in cash

APPLICATIONS:
sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

Email subject: FILM AFGHANISTAN

Please include:
first name, last name, age, phone number, and a photo.

-

ما به دنبال افرادی با پوست گندمی یا تیره هستیم تا نقش افغان‌ها را در یک فیلم سینمایی بازی کنند

ما در حال ساخت فیلمی درباره جنگ افغانستان هستیم. به دنبال زنان، مردان و کودکان با پوست گندمی یا تیره هستیم — لازم نیست حتماً افغان واقعی باشند.

هیچ تجربه‌ای لازم نیست! هر کسی می‌تواند ثبت‌نام کند و از نزدیک ببیند که پشت صحنه ساخت یک فیلم سینمایی چگونه است.

تاریخ و مکان: ۱۱ ژوئن ۲۰۲۶ — دابرووا گورنیچا

دستمزد: ۳۵۰ زلوتی نقدی

ثبت‌نام:sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

عنوان ایمیل:FILM AFGHANISTAN

لطفاً در ایمیل خود این موارد را ارسال کنید:نام، نام خانوادگی، سن، شماره تلفن و

items.text:
Darmowa sesja zdjęciowa: Kobiecość i pewność siebie 📸✨

​Szukam chętnych kobiet do nowego projektu. Buduję portfolio, więc sesja jest całkowicie bezpłatna.

​O co chodzi?

Krótko: subtelne kadry, dużo gry światłem i pokazywanie kobiecej pewności siebie. Bez sztuczności, tylko naturalność 

​Wymagania:

​Twoja przestrzeń: Sesja u Ciebie w domu/mieszkaniu (sypialnia, salon) lub w plenerze.cala polska)

​Zgoda na publikację: Zależy mi na pokazaniu efektów w moim portfolio.

​Chcesz poczuć się wyjątkowo i dostać klimatyczne zdjęcia? Napisz priv po szczegóły!  Nie odpowiadam na komentarze.📩

​#sesjafotograficzna #darmowasesja #kobiecość #fotografiaportretowa #sesjawdomu #portfolio

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – GŁÓWNA ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

 

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **CHŁOPCA 9-12 lat **uzdolnionego wokalnie (najchętniej śpiew ludowy, choć niekoniecznie).

Zdjęcia planowane na rok 2027, w tej chwili rozpoczynamy castingi.

** **

 

Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć wizytówkę jako link do You Tube, krótki opis doświadczenia przed kamerą oraz nagranie śpiewu chłopca (również jako link do You Tube).

Proszę nie podawać doświadczenia w reklamach ani statystowania.

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **WBG**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost**

W załączniku: **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka. Bez osób towarzyszących na zdjęciu.

items.text: 26/6/2026 في السينمات 🔥

sharedPost.text:
Asim.
The guardian.
Disciplined. Loyal. Unshaken.

A protector shaped by the unforgiving lands of prehistoric Kemet — standing watch as survival begins to shape the future of civilization.

26.6.26 — Survival Sparks Civilization

‎عاصم.
‎الحارس.
‎منضبط. وفيّ. لا يهتز.

‎حامٍ صاغته قسوة كيميت ما قبل التاريخ… يقف حارسًا بينما يبدأ البقاء في تشكيل مستقبل الحضارة.

‎٢٦.٦.٢٦ — البقاء يشعل الحضارة

#KemetYearOne #Kemet #DesertEagleFilms #BUCStudios #كيمت_السنة_الأولى

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — LEAD ROLE**

We are casting **LOGAN**, the lead role in the independent feature film **AFTERGLOW**.

**Shoot Dates:** August 13–23
**Filming Days:** Approx. 5–6 days
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA
**Pay:** Deferred pay with contract
**Includes:** IMDb credit, meals, footage

—

**Working Title:** *Afterglow*
**Genre:** Thriller / Drama

**Logline:**
After a party ends in a girl’s disappearance, a closeted teen is torn between the boy he never got over and the girl who helped him set the night in motion.

—

**ROLE: LOGAN — Lead**
**Age Range:** 18–25 to play 18
**Race/Ethnicity:** Open
**Height:** 5’10”–6’2” preferred
**Body Type:** Lean / athletic preferred

Logan is seen as the natural leader of his friend group: magnetic, eccentric, likable, and effortlessly charming without trying. He makes friends easily and draws people in, but beneath that charm, he is quietly unraveling.

Secretly struggling with his sexuality in an environment where vulnerability feels dangerous, Logan is caught between desire, repression, guilt, and the pressure of becoming an adult. He is emotionally guarded, impulsive, reactive, and occasionally self-destructive.

**Seeking LGBTQ+ actors strongly preferred.**

**Important Notes:**
This role requires strong emotional range, vulnerability, and intense chemistry with the actor playing Jason. Chemistry with Jason is essential to the story.

This role **includes intimacy**. All intimacy will be handled professionally, with clear communication, boundaries, and appropriate production protocols.

—

**To Submit:**
Please send your headshot, resume, reel, and availability to:

**[info@afterglowthefilm.com](mailto:info@afterglowthefilm.com)**

topComments.text: I would’ve loved this role but I’m older than what your looking for

items.text:
Hi everyone!

We are looking for extras for a nightclub scene in Beverly Hills for our independent series **COLD CITY**.

We need men and women, ages 21–45, all ethnicities are welcome.

**Date:** Thursday, May 28
**Call time:** 10:00 AM
**Location:** Beverly Hills
**Outfit:** Nightclub / going-out look, something you would wear to a nice club in Beverly Hills.

This is a small independent production, so we can offer a **$20 gas fee**, food on set, and a chance to be part of our series, meet great people, and have a fun filming experience.

If you’re interested and available, please send me a private message for all the details.

Thank you so much, and have a great day!

items.text:
Most actors will read this and do nothing. That is fine. This is not for them.
I am Freya Tingley. Two Netflix series regular roles. Six feature film leads. Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood.
Once Upon a Time on ABC.

Started at 14. No connections. No money. No Hollywood family. Signed with a top Hollywood agent by 17. Booked a Netflix series regular at 18, three months after moving to LA.

That is not luck. That is a strategy I can prove works, because I have run it on myself and watched it work on the
actors I have quietly coached for years.
Here is what most actors are doing.

Training, thousands of dollars.
New headshots, hundreds.
Self-tapes, no bookings.
Waiting for agents to call.

Years burned. Bank accounts drained. Confidence destroyed.

Here is what working actors are actually doing.

Optimising for the one specific skill that determines booking rate.
Engineering the conditions for representation to chase them.
Generating their own opportunities when reps go quiet.
Treating their career like a business, not a lottery ticket.

That is the difference. And nobody teaches it.

So I am running 2-hour private 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. Just you and me. Fully tailored to your career stage.

What you get:
• A diagnosis of why you are stuck, specific not generic
• The booking skill audit, will rewire how you audition
• A representation strategy if you do not have an agent
• A re-activation strategy if your agent has gone cold• A self-generated opportunity plan you can run this month
• My exact materials checklist

Outcome: you leave with a written plan. No confusion. No "what now". Just execution.

If you know you are ready, DM me "COMMIT" to apply.

I take a handful of these a month. That is it.

items.text:
9 UK ACTORS WANTED- Particularly interested in males as most applicants so far have been female- under 25 year olds- please read the whole post before applying- £18 job film from home- filming must be completed in the next few days. 

Actors wanted to film videos reading off a script*- the script will be on your PC which you can read directly off as either your face will be blurred or it will be a Voiceover. Actors 1-3 must be comfortable with their face on camera. All other faces will be blurred. 

*For actors 1-3 you will have a few lines you must say direct to the camera without a script but these are short and easy to remember

Actor 1: Must own a ‘funny wig’- the type you see at fancy dress parties- but it must be long hair as opposed to an afro- examples include rainbow coloured wigs- if you’re interested I will ask for a photo of the wig. You do not have to wear the wig.

Actor 1-3 Must be comfortable with their face on camera

All other actors will have their faces blurred

All actors: You will have multiple scripts to read off a computer screen- the computer screen cannot be in shot of the camera but, due to your faces being blurred, you can just read directly off the camera. Due to the nature of it, you will need to have 3 ‘outfit changes’- for example Outfit 1: just be in a top Outfit 2: change the top Outfit 3: put a jumper/coat on

The scripts involve heavy topics surrounding mental health issues, with certain things that could possibly triggering

Actors 1-3 will partake in both a video about bullying and a documentary I am making about CAMHS

Actors 4-9 will only feature in the documentary I am making about CAMHS

If you are interested please fill out this short form and also (either) comment or message me on Facebook to advise me you have done the form- communication will be via Facebook

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeGW-P8APDoaWPSfd5RzIb0ifDTkmzYCleySrEXt5VbGfGUeQ/viewform?usp=publish-editor

topComments.text:
What is it for? Where will the footage/ voiceover be used? How many words/minutes is each script? If for broadcast, is there a buyout?  How long will it take to record- really, ie a 2 mins script can take an hour to produce, so how much are you expecting for your £18?
Please people if you are applying for this role, do your due diligence.

UK wide

items.text:
🎬 Für unseren Bachelor-Abschlussfilm suchen wir dringend noch einen Schauspieler für eine Vaterrolle, als auch zwei Kleindartseller.

Gedreht wird ein Mystery-Thriller als One-Take (mit Hidden Cuts), inspiriert von „Adolescence“ und „Knives Out“.

👤 Vater von Lennard

•⁠  ⁠männlich, Spielalter 50–60, deutsch

Lennards Vater ist der Stadtpolizist der Kleinstadt: streng, stur, kontrolliert und wenig emotional. Er glaubt an Ordnung und klare Regeln, handelt aber aus dem Wunsch heraus, seine Familie zu beschützen.

👤 Stadtpolizist (Kleindarsteller)

 männlich, Spielalter 35–60, ab 180 cm

📅 Dreh: 28.05. (Nachtdreh, auf den 29.05.)

📍 Erdweg bei Dachau

🍽️ Verpflegung & ggf. Unterkunft vorhanden

💰 Studentenfilm, leider ohne Gage

topComments.text: Bin 34, vielleicht würde es ja passen

items.summary: Bite-Sized Shakespeare.
items.title: Bite-Sized Shakespeare.

items.text:
You are in for a grandma-granddaughter, human-organ-smuggling-to-Poland road trip of a lifetime. But in order to film it, we have to rent the car, pay the gran, buy food and, and, and… well, all of that requires money. And technology too.

We are a team of women creatives making **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")**, a darkly funny road-trip film set in the 1990s.

Sasha, a troubled woman tangled in organized crime, is tasked with smuggling a cooler of human organs from Ukraine to Poland. Her unpredictable grandmother unexpectedly joins the journey, turning the trip into something neither of them expects.

We're currently competing for funding through Decentralized Pictures and would love your support.

**How to help:**
1. Open Chrome on your laptop.
2. Visit: https://app.decentralized.pictures/.../6a11e333fde507ae32...
3. Find **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")** in the Filmmakers Assistance Grant.
4. Vote and leave a review.
5. Share with anyone who supports independent cinema.

If you're a filmmaker, Decentralized Pictures is also a great resource for discovering film funding opportunities.

[[https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)

# 📸 **TFP SWIMWEAR / BEACH EDITORIAL SHOOT – ***ZADAR*

Photographer based in Zadar looking for models for a swimwear / beach editorial collaboration (TFP).

**Concept:** natural light, beach lifestyle, natural lighting.

📍 Location: Zadar / nearby beaches
👙 Style: swimwear / summer editorial
📅 Date: 07.06.2016 - 11.06.2026

**You will receive:** edited professional photos for portfolio + tag credits

**Looking for:** beginner or experienced models open to collaboration

DM with photos / Instagram if interested.

@lauramendes_lens

**Background/Extras for a charity film:**

1 x Family (2 Adults, 1-3 Kids, Any genders)
11th June
Approx 2 hours

Location TBD (within the Liverpool area)

Travel must be handled independently

We are shooting a mini documentary for a children's charity in Liverpool and need a family playing in the background of some footage. Many thanks for any interest!

items.title: **CASTING CALL**

items.text:
Music Video Casting
Hello

I am currently casting for a music video production shooting in Liverpool on June 6th and looking for local people.   I have attached the casting call in the event you may want to express and interest.   

Particularly interested in hearing from.

PUBLIC SERVICE AND HEALTHCARE WORKERS

PEOPLE FROM DIFFERENT SUBCULTURES

PEOPLE WITH UNIQUE INTERESTS

PEOPLE 70+

Thank you

Casey

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '@CASEYBSHAW CASTING CALL MUSIC VIDEO LIVERPOOL 6TH JUNE REAL PEOPLE & PERFORMERS SEEKING A WIDE RANGE OF FACES, PERSONALITIES, AGES, AND BACKGROUNDS NO ACTING EXPERIENCE NECESSARY PAID OPPORTUNITY TO APPLY, PLEASE SEND: RECENT NAME PHOTOS/VIDEOS LOCATION INSTAGRAM HANDLE / SOCIALS DM OR EMAIL: CASEYBERNICESHAWOGMATL.COM COM PLEASE FEEL FREE TO SHARE.'

items.text:
Für einen Werbedreh in Stuttgart mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft suchen wir noch Komparsen im alter von 12-18 Jahren, Jungen und Mädchen, die gut bis sehr gut Fußball spielen können. 

Das ganze ist leider sehr Spontan und findet bereits morgen statt. 

Bei Interesse bitte direkt 1-2 Fotos mit schicken. 
Vielen Dank und vielleicht bis morgen.

topComments.text: Ich habe dir übrigens schon einmal in den Kommentaren bei einem ähnlichen Beitrag geschrieben, dass man dir leider keine DM schicken kann und auch keine E-Mail-Adresse für Bewerbungen angegeben ist.
Es gibt auch gar kein Hinweis über die Gage?!

items.text:
Hello everyone! 

Sharing information about the upcoming PRACTICE LAB by PROJEKT EUROPA in London - all workshops are led by wonderful international artists!

**10 June 2026 - 18:00-20:00**- Chisenhale Dance Space, 64-84 Chisenhale Road, London, E3 5QZ.

**Ensemble Theatre Making with Halfpace Theatre **led by** **Megan Brewer 

This session looks at ways of building an ensemble as a foundation for devised work and how to build a welcoming environment for your collective. We’ll go over co-creating codes of conduct, exercises and warm-ups to foster team understanding and trust; how to take a survey of ‘who is in the room’; and a few ways to devise using collective movement and elements such as sound and lighting.

PRACTICE LAB is a curated series of workshops by PROJEKT EUROPA led by international theatre makers, offered in partnership with Chisenhale Dance Space in London. These workshops are aimed at sharing the wealth of skills and knowledge in the migrant artist community and creating new and unexpected connections between theatre makers from all communities.

Participants are asked to make a small contribution, starting at £5, to help cover programme costs.

For more information and to book, visit: [[https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6MURtkiwi5u3I_SjuOeBAfY7AhWr_i_KdAjMyVqhVAnbPHXVMkLj0S_xAWqA_aem_37e7tl3N7fomzbiT0SDj9A&brid=YWdncwF3oE3PfCy7A0jt9rzAm-C7)]([https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.projekteuropa.org%2Flab%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wH2CMLT7rt0F69kpeSpbP2xb2LbM9OutspDRlsbYsF5bpy77HRxa7r96Lmw_aem_yFDP_eO7ruhhw9vumhF_VA%26brid%3DYWdncwFNOV3hP8jxUEkazqmV3Nih&h=AUBpqUPyU0dHXZTC59jShCXyR0QWcXJG99MbQSIbjO2i38w0UKCKLdUNkBJmWvchtIOHBojgs88hkA9Iza3xjfQcKl3_MHG90oS0yhWAmo4Yw7NHhbQFBzmy-_3-GC5gDK6hcgyyPlROyQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDmrSsYxuTJ93CtqBRxUqmGGyzMN-fumFjddGqenYoCv__WxU-R-rBxBLYUqkVWPEN-oJewkZ5Kg2_gSOJsp9rOvig5IxIXcdjqoRLJY8E3AoyiQpuq5gzN28QMaQQ9cq9-pr7jccDCk_HAPXrMnWqcMCRSWY3QIM6RCgN49Hvp))

Thank you!

items.title: Hello everyone!

items.text:
Get your** EARLY BIRD DISCOUNT before May 31st**! 

**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy** 
**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

>> **Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** 
>> **Organic Breathing & Image Work**
>> **Kutiyattam Traditional Theatre** (Kerala, India) 
>> **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> **The Actor’s Energy and Presence** 
>> **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia 🇭🇷, **Remith Ramesh**, India 🇮🇳, **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰, **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: **Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳, **Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮, **Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮, **Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭** Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text: Joe TenBroek, David Versace, Michael Pickard, and I want to give a huge shout-out to all the amazing creatives, collaborators, artists and all-stars that created this amazing Concept Pilot! We couldn't fit everyone into the video, so I ask you to please take a moment to check out The Hook IMDb page, and give these people the congratulations they deserve! Take a bow! Not too shabby for ST Park Productions first project!

sharedPost.text:
We wanted to do something special for the extraordinary cast and crew that we had aboard. We hope you enjoy the footage.

We are so grateful for the expertise, love, and support from these fine individuals. There is no concept pilot without you. Seriously. From the bottom of our hearts: Thank You.

Some may not be pictured here, due to limited BTS, but every single person on this project was so critical to it's success. Rock on, everyone!

Don't get Addicted, Get Hooked!!!

items.text:
✨ OPEN AUDITIONS – NEW LOCAL YOUTH PRODUCTION ✨
📍 BASED IN MOUNTSORREL, LEICESTERSHIRE 📍

Hi everyone! 👋 I’m so excited to announce I am launching a brand new youth performance group right here in our local community, and auditions are now OPEN! 🎭🎶

🎭 **A BIT ABOUT ME**
My name is Sam and I am 17 and currently studying a Musical Theatre course at a Performing Arts College. I have a huge passion for all things performance - acting, singing, dancing and choreography are what I love most! 🩰✨

I am extremely hard-working and dedicated; I achieved top grades across ALL my GCSE subjects, so you can be sure this project will be organised, professional and run to a high standard 📚✅

I will be leading, directing, choreographing AND performing alongside you - bringing everything I have learnt and experienced to make this something truly special for all of us! 🫶

💡 **WHAT ARE WE DOING?**
We are creating a magical, high-energy festive show for Christmas/Winter 2026 🎄❄️

We haven’t decided the exact show yet – 
**YOU get a say too!** We will choose together between:
• 🎭 A classic Pantomime (e.g. Cinderella, Aladdin, Snow White – all the favourites!)
• 🎶 *Nativity! The Musical* – fun, chaotic, energetic and everyone knows & loves it!
• 💬 …OR suggest your own ideas! All welcome 📝

This will include acting, singing, dancing and cheer-style choreography – something for everyone!

👥 **WHO IS THIS FOR?**
Open to ages **14 – 21** roughly anyway but open to all for auditions
Perfect for:
✅ Students / college students
✅ Anyone who loves acting, singing or dancing
✅ Cheerleaders / dance students
✅ Beginners AND those with experience – **NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED!** You just need enthusiasm, commitment and a love for performing ✨

🗓️ **REHEARSAL SCHEDULE**
✅ **STARTS MID/END SEPTEMBER 2026**
✅ ** LIKELY EVERY SATURDAY Time TBC / venue TBC but likely Mountsorrel Methodist Hall / local community centre – all central, easy access 📍

💻 **PLUS:** Occasional short Zoom sessions (weekday evenings, every 2–3 weeks)
→ Used only to run lines, sing together or check progress – **flexible, low-pressure
Great for fitting around college / work / other activities 📱

🎬 **PERFORMANCES:**
✨ **LATE DECEMBER 2026 OR EARLY JANUARY 2027** ✨
*(depending on when we can hire a venue for the show and We vote as a team! January means extra time to polish everything perfectly – less rush, better result!)
📍 **Show Venue:** likely Mountsorrel Memorial Centre (MMC) Theatre** – proper stage, lighting & sound – professional experience! 🎭

💸 **COSTS**
There is a small participation fee of £25 – £30 per person per month
⚠️ **100% TRANSPARENT – NO HIDDEN COSTS:**
This money ONLY covers rehearsal venue hire, show venue hire, scripts, music, props, production materials and admin.
👉 **I DO NOT PROFIT FROM THIS** – I am directing, choreographing and performing alongside you completely for free! Everything goes straight into making our show the best it can be ✅

✨ **ROLES AVAILABLE**
• Lead acting / speaking roles
• Solo / group singing parts
• Featured dance / cheer roles
• Ensemble / Chorus – *everyone gets plenty of stage time!*
• Also looking for 1–2 people interested in helping with creative / assistant work alongside me!

📩 **HOW TO APPLY / BOOK AN AUDITION**
👉 Comment ‘INTERESTED’ below
👉 I will then send u a private message on Facebook or instagram, whichever u prefer, (just let me know ur user if it’s instagram)
👉I will then create a group with all prepped interested to dicuss it further
👉any questions regarding auditions ect plz email samg56811@gmail.com

Auditions will be held via self tapes anytime from now till end of July. Email me if u want more details on this

Come join me – let’s make theatre magic right here in our local area! 🎶🩰✨

Please share with anyone you think might be interested! 📢💛

#Mountsorrel #Charnwood #Loughborough #YouthTheatre #PerformingArts #MusicalTheatre #Panto2026 #NativityMusical #LeicestershireEvents #StudentProject

sharedPost.text:
“CDP” o Chef de Partie 👨‍🍳🔥

Ito yung chef na assigned sa specific station sa kusina — halimbawa grill, pasta, fry, pantry, o hot kitchen.

Siya yung may responsibility siguraduhin na maayos ang prep, quality, at labas ng pagkain sa station niya habang service.

Sa madaling salita…
Siya yung “boss” ng station niya 😅

Kaya pag CDP ka na:
• Mas mataas pressure
• Mas madaming responsibility
• Ikaw sasalo pag sabog station mo 😂

Pero real talk…
Dito din nahahasa leadership, bilis, at diskarte mo sa kusina.

At minsan… dito nagsisimula na matatawag kang “qpal” kasi gusto ma promote agad 😄 hahaha” arayy mo…. #cheflife #cheflifedaily

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für die regelmäßige Content-Produktion unserer Social-Media-Kanäle suchen wir für **Ende Juni** sympathische Gesichter vor der Kamera! Wir drehen in zwei wunderschönen Hotels an der Ostsee und suchen dafür unterschiedliche Profile (Vorkenntnisse sind nicht notwendig!):

**📍 OPTION 1: **IFA Rügen Hotel & Ferienpark
* **Gesucht:** Familien (optimal 2 Erwachsene und maximal 2 Kinder)
* **Alter:** Eltern zwischen 25 und 45 Jahren, Kinder bis maximal 12 Jahre

**📍 OPTION 2: **IFA Graal-Müritz Hotel, Spa & Tagungen
* **Gesucht:** Ein Paar
* **Alter:** Zwischen 25 und 50 Jahren

🗓️ **Wann?** Ab Ende Juni oder auch in den kommenden Monaten (genaue Termine und Tage stimmen wir individuell ab).

💡 **Ablauf & Setting:** Es gibt einen festen, vorgegebenen Drehplan. Ihr werdet von unserem Produktionsteam professionell und entspannt angeleitet und setzt gemeinsam mit uns schöne Urlaubsszenen im Hotel um (z. B. beim Frühstück, im Wellnessbereich oder am Strand).

Da das Projekt im Rahmen einer Kooperation ohne Geldfluss realisiert wird, bieten wir euch einen tollen Mehrwert:
* **Übernachtung & Verpflegung:** Wir laden euch für den Zeitraum des Drehs zu uns ins jeweilige Hotel ein – für eure Unterkunft sowie die komplette Verpflegung ist selbstverständlich gesorgt!
* **High-End-Material:** Nach dem Dreh stellen wir euch das professionell produzierte und bearbeitete Bild- und Videomaterial (Studio-Qualität) sehr gerne kostenfrei zur Verfügung – eine tolle Erinnerung oder perfekt für die eigene Sedcard / das Portfolio.
* **Erfahrung:** Ein spannender Blick hinter die Kulissen eines professionellen Drehteams.

**Interesse?** Wenn ihr Zeit und Lust auf einen Kurztrip inkl. Shooting an der Ostsee habt, schreibt uns gerne eine Nachricht mit:
1. Für welches Hotel (Rügen oder Graal-Müritz) ihr euch bewerbt
2. Aktuellen Fotos von euch (bzw. eurer Familie) und/oder Proben aus vorherigen Projekten
3. Eurem Alter (bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)(bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)
4. Eurer Verfügbarkeit Ende Juni 

Wir freuen uns auf eure Nachrichten! 📩

items.text:
A very beautiful and special project is being implemented soon by the Parousia Acting Craft Collective under the direction of Molly Caliger @mollycaligervoice at the Kallirois Theater. We will be happy to have you with us, in a play based on the ancient Greek Myth of Philomele and Procne in the English language. A play that explores human passions, fears and the price that women have paid throughout time for the courage to remain true to themselves. 
PRE-SALE
TICKET SERVICES
– online: [www.ticketservices.gr](https://www.ticketservices.gr)
– by phone: 2107234567
– ticket office: Panepistimiou 39, Athens

A very beautiful and special project is being implemented soon by the Parousia Acting Craft Collective under the direction of Molly Caliger @mollycaligervoice at the Kallirois Theater. We will be happy to have you with us, in a play based on the ancient Greek Myth of Philomele and Procne in the English language. A play that explores human passions, fears and the price that women have paid throughout time for the courage to remain true to themselves. 
PRE-SALE
TICKET SERVICES
– online: [www.ticketservices.gr](https://www.ticketservices.gr)
– by phone: 2107234567
– ticket office: Panepistimiou 39, Athens

🎬 LOOKING FOR 3–4 MALE EXTRAS 🎬

For a music video shoot in the W13 (Ealing) area.

📍 Location: W13, West London
📅 Date: Sunday 7th June
🕒 Time: Evening (approximately 2 hours)

We’re looking for confident male extras aged 20–35 with strong on-camera presence and a good crew/friends energy for background scenes in the video.

All ethnicities welcome.

Preferred:
• Athletic, fit or solid build
• Streetwear style
• Comfortable on camera

Streetwear / dark clothing preferred:

* Hoodies
* Jackets
* Sneakers/trainers
* Black or dark-coloured outfits

💷 Compensation: £50 cash per person

If interested, please send your Instagram profile or a few recent photos via DM or email:

📧 C11AMPIONBEATS@gmail.com

Thanks!

items.text:
I have seen plenty of posts on here asking about social media and how it can affect casting opportunities. So we three actor-content creators have banded together to create Social Media classes for actors that want to grow their followings and learn how to make good content that can help their potential. 

Right now, we have one public seminar (first Saturday of the month) alongside unlimited 1-to-1 coaching. Come check us out if you would like to join us for some advice or leave questions below and I am happy to answer 😁 

www.actsocmed.com

items.text:
Hi all. My daughter has just finished at a top drama school, but i have to admit, im extremely disappointed with how its all finished. 
They had an end of year performance, but no talk from the head, or any faculty member actually.. There was no assistance of what to do next, no advice on how to secure an agent, a list of agencies etc. No headshot day. No agency day. I just feel like its all finished and there has been no 'ending' as such. Is this normal? I dont want to name the school. 

My daughter is just now feeling very lost. Its obviously too late now to consider unis etc, so shes going to take a year out and work.

topComments.text: Not like a top drama school then! My dd's school did offer a lot of support, had a showcase day for the industry and also gave some guidance (not exactly modern but they tried). However this is for the degree course. They don't do that for diploma or short course students.
She can still apply to university until 30th June

items.text:
🐈‍⬛💰WEŹ UDZIAŁ W IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ
Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:

• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡

• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡

• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!

•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

•🎬Rywalizujesz tylko z osobami w studio, nie ma quizów, testów wiedzy, szanse większe niż w Lotto ! 

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:

• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.

• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL

Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ

W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – MA STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON)
Hi everyone!

We are a group of three MA Visual Effects students in London currently developing a short live-action + CGI film exploring the unseen emotional experiences of wheelchair users and the feelings of exclusion or isolation that can arise in everyday situations.

We are looking for a wheelchair user actor (or performer with lived experience) to play the lead role in our short film.

About the role:

* Lead role in a ~1-minute short film

* A quiet, emotional, visually driven performance

* The story follows a wheelchair user in a casual setting with friends while visualising their internal thoughts and invisible struggles through cinematic VFX metaphors.

Shoot details:

📍 London

📅 TBA (end of May / beginning of June)

💰 All expenses paid 

We are committed to approaching this story with care, authenticity, and respect, and would love to collaborate with someone who connects with the project and would be interested in helping shape the portrayal.

If interested (or if you know someone who may be!), please comment below or send me a DM. We’d be happy to share more details and the project deck/script.

Thank you! ✨

items.text:
Casting Call: Middle-Aged Female Actor (Short Film)
Hello!

I’m currently casting for a short film that follows a mother and daughter reuniting at the daughter’s flat after six months apart. It’s an intimate, fly-on-the-wall chamber drama, shot entirely inside a London flat on a very small budget.

**The role: **
* Mother (playing age 50–60)
*  Warm, complex, emotionally grounded character

I have already cast the daughter, who is Welsh, so a Welsh actor would be ideal for authenticity but this is not essential.

**Shoot dates: **TBC, likely late July.

**Shoot length: **1-2 days.

**Location:** Bow, London.

**Please note that this is an unpaid role, though travel/expenses can be covered where needed. It’s a strong character-driven piece and will be a great collaborative experience with a small team.**

If you’re interested or would like more details about the story/character, feel free to DM me.

Thanks so much!

items.text:
Seeking Male Actor for Private Conversational Role – London
Looking for a British-born South Asian male actor (mid 20s–40s) fluent in Urdu and English with a natural UK accent for a private in-person conversational role.

Requirements:

* Fluent Urdu and English speaker

* British-born with authentic UK accent

* Based in London

* Confident, calm, mature presence

* Able to naturally portray an older brother figure

* Comfortable improvising during conversation

* Acting or voice experience preferred but not essential

The role involves accompanying me during a brief personal meeting and helping communicate seriousness and sincerity in a respectful way.

This is a confidential/private situation, so full details will only be shared with genuinely interested applicants.

Paid role.

Please send:

* Age

* Area of London

* Languages spoken

* Voice note or short video intro

* Any acting/voice experience

items.text:
Places & People: Burcu and Turkish Hospitality 1 - KarrideoTV https://youtu.be/rSky6aV76DM 

Burcu in Faralya is the beginning of a special KarrideoTV travel series about hospitality, nature, craftsmanship and the story behind the Soap Lady. 

In this first part of Places & People, I, Christian Weiße, meet host Burcu on her property in Faralya. Many people know Burcu as the Soap Lady, but behind this name there is much more than just a beautiful travel image. 

This video is not a classic hotel tour and not a superficial travel recommendation. It is a calm travel dialogue about a special place, a special woman and a world created from nature, family, soap craftsmanship, art and genuine hospitality. 

Faralya is located above Ölüdeniz and combines Mediterranean landscapes, peace, views and proximity to the Lycian Way. This is exactly where the atmosphere is created that Burcu’s guests describe again and again: personal, warm, slow-paced and full of details. 

In Part 1, the first glimpse opens onto Burcu, her energy and the place where Soap Lady Cottage, Daisy Suite and Lion Suite become a small Mediterranean world of experience. 

This video is part of the KarrideoTV playlist “TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure”. 

Subscribe, like, share and comment to follow the full series. 

Which encounter while traveling has ever shown you that a place becomes truly special because of the person behind it? 

Links and resources: 

Soap Lady & More: https://soapladyoludeniz.com/

items.text:
Khalif Walter Malone im Interview im Neuen Kölner Filmhaus: Filmton, Blues, Chicago und Köln verbinden sich zu einem Gespräch über Klang, Setarbeit und kreative Wege. 

Dieses Interview entstand direkt beim Netzwerktreffen des Neuen Kölner Filmhauses e.V. im Atelier MyMiniMe in Köln-Ehrenfeld. Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße trafen dort Khalif Walter Malone, vielen bekannt als kdub_audioguy und Khalif Wailin’ Walter. Das Gespräch fand im Umfeld der freien Filmszene statt und lief im Beisein des Teams der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion, das als Gast der WhatsApp-Gruppe vor Ort war. 

Im Mittelpunkt steht ein Mann, der Klang nicht nur technisch versteht, sondern künstlerisch lebt. Khalif kommt aus Chicago, lebt heute in Deutschland und arbeitet im Film- und TV-Audiobereich als Boom Operator, Audio Assistant, Sound Mixer und Tonproduzent. Gleichzeitig bringt er als Musiker, Gitarrist, Sänger und Blues-Künstler eine besondere Tiefe in jedes Gespräch über Sound, Rhythmus und Atmosphäre. 

Das Neue Kölner Filmhaus e.V. wurde für dieses Interview zum idealen Ort. Der Verein zur Förderung der freien Filmkultur bringt Filmschaffende, Künstler, Filmstudenten, Quereinsteiger und Filminteressierte zusammen. Hier geht es um Austausch, Filmteams, Projekte, Kino, Festivals, Förderungen und gemeinsames Lernen. 

Dieses Video zeigt, wie aus einem Netzwerkabend ein echtes Interview wird! 

Teile dieses Video mit Menschen, die Film, Musik, Ton, Blues, Köln, kreative Netzwerke oder die Arbeit der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion spannend finden. 

#KhalifWalterMalone #kdub_audioguy #NeuesKölnerFilmhaus #Karrideo #Filmton

items.summary:
Khalif Walter Malone im Interview im Neuen Kölner Filmhaus: Filmton, Blues, Chicago und Köln verbinden sich zu einem Gespräch über Klang, Setarbeit und kreative Wege. 

Dieses Interview entstand direkt beim Netzwerktreffen des Neuen Kölner Filmhauses e.V. im Atelier MyMiniMe in Köln-Ehrenfeld. Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße trafen dort Khalif Walter Malone, vielen bekannt als kdub_audioguy und Khalif Wailin’ Walter. Das Gespräch fand im Umfeld der freien Filmszene statt und lief im Beisein des Teams der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion, das als Gast der WhatsApp-Gruppe vor Ort war. 

Im Mittelpunkt steht ein Mann, der Klang nicht nur technisch versteht, sondern künstlerisch lebt. Khalif kommt aus Chicago, lebt heute in Deutschland und arbeitet im Film- und TV-Audiobereich als Boom Operator, Audio Assistant, Sound Mixer und Tonproduzent. Gleichzeitig bringt er als Musiker, Gitarrist, Sänger und Blues-Künstler eine besondere Tiefe in jedes Gespräch über Sound, Rhythmus und Atmosphäre. 

Das Neue Kölner Filmhaus e.V. wurde für dieses Interview zum idealen Ort. Der Verein zur Förderung der freien Filmkultur bringt Filmschaffende, Künstler, Filmstudenten, Quereinsteiger und Filminteressierte zusammen. Hier geht es um Austausch, Filmteams, Projekte, Kino, Festivals, Förderungen und gemeinsames Lernen. 

Dieses Video zeigt, wie aus einem Netzwerkabend ein echtes Interview wird! 

Teile dieses Video mit Menschen, die Film, Musik, Ton, Blues, Köln, kreative Netzwerke oder die Arbeit der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion spannend finden. 

#KhalifWalterMalone #kdub_audioguy #NeuesKölnerFilmhaus #Karrideo #Filmton

🎙️ KARRIDEO TV – Mindset • Business • Stories 

KarrideoTV ist dein deutschsprachiges Magazin für Persönlichkeitsentwicklung, Business, Gesellschaft und wahre Geschichten. Wir bringen dir journalistische Reportagen, Interviews, Expertenwissen, Dokumentationen und Mindset-Impulse – für Menschen, die mehr aus ihrem Leben machen wollen.

https://www.youtube.com/@KarrideoTV

items.text:
CASTING CALL — CHILD ACTRESS (ATLANTA, GA)
Independent Short Film: “Glass Crown: The Repast

Production is currently seeking a young actress to portray ATHENA, a key supporting role in an emotionally grounded dramatic short film.

ROLE:

ATHENA

Black female

Age Range: 6–10 years old

Athena is observant, intelligent, calm, and emotionally mature beyond her years. She carries a quiet presence and strong emotional depth.

FILMING LOCATION:

Atlanta, Georgia

PLEASE NOTE:

Applicants must be based in or able to work as a local hire in Atlanta, GA.

SHOOT DATES:

June 12–14, 2026

(Child actors will not be needed for all shoot days.)

COMPENSATION:

This is an unpaid independent short film project.

Meals will be provided on set.

IMDb credit and festival exposure included.

TO SUBMIT:

Please send:

• Headshot or recent photo

• Age

• Acting reel or self-tape (if available)

• Parent/guardian contact information

Send submissions to:

LadyOnyxx89@gmail.com 

Director:

Jessica Carter

“Glass Crown: The Repast”

items.summary:
CASTING CALL — CHILD ACTRESS (ATLANTA, GA)
Independent Short Film: “Glass Crown: The Repast

Production is currently seeking a young actress to portray ATHENA, a key supporting role in an emotionally grounded dramatic short film.

ROLE:

ATHENA

Black female

Age Range: 6–10 years old

Athena is observant, intelligent, calm, and emotionally mature beyond her years. She carries a quiet presence and strong emotional depth.

FILMING LOCATION:

Atlanta, Georgia

PLEASE NOTE:

Applicants must be based in or able to work as a local hire in Atlanta, GA.

SHOOT DATES:

June 12–14, 2026

(Child actors will not be needed for all shoot days.)

COMPENSATION:

This is an unpaid independent short film project.

Meals will be provided on set.

IMDb credit and festival exposure included.

TO SUBMIT:

Please send:

• Headshot or recent photo

• Age

• Acting reel or self-tape (if available)

• Parent/guardian contact information

Send submissions to:

LadyOnyxx89@gmail.com 

Director:

Jessica Carter

“Glass Crown: The Repast”

items.text:
**WE’RE BACK! - THE PRICE IS RIGHT TONIGHT SEASON 2**

*The Price is Right Tonight *hosted by Howie Mandel is back for season 2! And we'd love to see you apply!! Join our studio audience for a chance to come on down and play for big wins, big prizes and big money!

**DATES:**

Filming takes place in Toronto from June 23rd to 30th, 2026, with three daily tapings at 12:30 pm, 4:00 pm and 7:00 pm. 

**APPLICATION DETAILS:**

You must apply as a group of at least 4 people (including yourself), with the option to apply with up to 10 people total. Groups can include friends, family, or colleagues!

Complete the application below and submit a photo for each group member.

**ELIGIBILITY:**

Each applicant must complete their own section, review, and agree to the rules at the end of the form.

To be eligible to compete:
* All applicants must be 19+ at the time of application
* All applicants must have the right to live and work in Canada
* All applicants must be available to film in Toronto between June 23 - 30, 2026

Below is the application link for the show. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to [Casting@priceproductionsinc.com](mailto:Casting@priceproductionsinc.com)

APPLY HERE NOW: [https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/](https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/)

items.text:
Background performers needed as wedding and Melse guests (volunteer)
We're working on a beautiful low budget short film set at an Ethiopian wedding. 

Our dates:

- Saturday, June 13

- Sunday, June 14 (half a day)

Location: Surrey, BC

It is unpaid; however we are providing lunch and craft service.

It's a celebration of culture! Be part of our delightful guests.

If interested, please fill out our google form: 

https://forms.gle/i5ECJZGkRMiNCMHPA

Thank you!

PROJECT TITLE: MELSE PROJECT TYPE: SHORT FILM FILMING DATES: JUNE 13, JUNE 14 FILMING LOC: SURREY DIRECTOR: MIMI DEJENE PRODUCER: VICKY PLANCHER, DANIEL NEGATU, TAMMY TSANG LOGLINE: AN ETHIOPIAN BRIDE TELLS HER MOTHER SHE DOESN'T WANT to BE MARRIED, DURING HER MELSE CEREMONY. DEADLINE: WED, JUNE 3, 5PM'

items.text:
Do czerwcowych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Gangster 2 (20-25) – masywny.
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Gangster 1 (30-40) – masywny.
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Daniel (31) – Normalny typ, ma żonę, dziecko. Przeciętnej postury, w okularach. 
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

4. Dłużnik (32) – ćpun, szczupły. 
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

5. Emil „Macias” Mańczuk (34) – umięśniony, mile widziane tatuaże.
Daty: 11. i 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

6. Maciej „Wyga” Wyganowski (36) – lichwiarz; wysoki, sprawny fizycznie. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7. Grzegorz Płocki (36) – bandzior, któremu zlecono pobicie; umięśniony, typ ulicznego dresa. 
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

8. Ojciec Amelii (37) – emocjonalny, wybuchowy. Bardzo kocha córkę i dla niej by nawet zabił. Wysoki, szczupły.
Data: 10. i 11. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

9. Luka – Łukasz Sitowski (42) – szef szajki, od lat prowadzi różne nielegalne interesy: handel narkotykami, zastraszenia, haracze. Równolegle ma rodzinę i żyje „normalnie”. Średniego wzrostu, dość przysadzisty. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł netto

10. Aleksander Sakowski (48) – bojaźliwy, w dobrej kondycji.  
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

11. Mirek Osiński (52) – napadnięty mężczyzna; postawny, odważny, w dobrej kondycji. 
Daty: 11. i 13. czerwca 
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

12. Sebastian Stańczuk (58) – szef firmy budowlanej; krępy, łysiejący.  
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu
